taxonomy: Aylthonia luzulifolia is a genus of lichens in the family Gomphillaceae. The exact classification of Aylthonia luzulifolia can be further broken down into the kingdom Fungi, division Ascomycota, and class Gomphillomycetes. However, more specific classification may be available in the latest scientific research. Further classification may also include order Gomphillales and family Gomphillaceae. The classification is based on the lichen's morphology and genetic characteristics.
